ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. [HEARING - JUNE-22-2023 AT 8:30 AM]

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2023 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF SERVICE TO AUG-09-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ITALIAN GUSTO USA, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ATTILLO ADINOLFI VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DORSIA PROVISIONS INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN PATRICK MAUZ, OWNER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF FOR CSM-23-866706 PROVIDED THE COURT WITH PROOFS OF SERVICE FOR ALL THREE CASES: RELATED CASES: CSM-23-866706, & CSM-866904. DEFENDANT, CAME TO COURT 15 MINUTES LATE, INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE WAS ONLY AWARE OF 2 CASES AND PROVIDED COPIES OF CLAIMS FOR CASES CSM- 23-866821 & CSM-23-866904. CASE CSM-23-866904 HAD A SCRIVENER'S ERROR WITH THE SAME PLAINTIFF'S NAME IN CSM-23-866706. DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE SERVICE ISSUES, AND REQUESTS TO CURE SERVICE FOR UNTIMELY FILINGS AND THAT HE BE PROPERLY SERVED IN THIS CSM-23-866706. ***DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM*** PLAINTIFF REQUESTS AN ITALIAN INTERPRETER, IF UNAVAILABLE THE PLAINTIFF FOR CSM-23-866706 CAN INTERPRET. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCES ARE EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2023 BY JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG. PLAINTIFF ITALIAN GUSTO USA, LLC IS REPRESENTED BY ATTILIO ADINOLFI WHO IS PRESENT REMOTELY VIA ZOOMGOV AND IS ASSISTED BY ITALIAN INTERPRETER MARIA MENEGAZZI (OATH ON FILE). DEFENDANT DORSIA PROVISIONS, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN PATRICK MAUZ, OWNER. DECLARATIONS ON FILE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAIINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: HON. GARRETT L. WONG; CLERKS: K. SEPTIEN AND L. BARENG. NOT REPORTED. (D504)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ITALIAN GUSTO USA LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DORSIA PROVISIONS INC. $2,967.64 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,017.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Set For Trial On Oct-19-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant, the moving party, Justin Mauz, on behalf of Dorsia Provisions Inc., appears in Pro Per.
Respondent/Plaintiff, the opposing party, Italian Gusto USA LLC, is not present.
Court certified interpreter, Maria Menegazzi, is present for Respondent/Plaintiff, Italian Gusto USA LLC.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant/Defendant, Justin Mauz, on behalf of Dorsia Provisions Inc., requests to continue the matter. The Court denies the request.
The Court declares the matter will not proceed due to Respondent/Plaintiff's absence.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court orders matter submitted and takes matter under submission. An envelope containing exhibits from Respondent/Plaintiff, Italian Gusto USA LLC., remains in the case folder. Judge: Honorable Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: C. Cheng; Reporter: Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Assigned. (D611)
